Core, IO optimizations and fix SBIW instruction due to wrong descript… Core, IO optimizations and fix SBIW instruction due to wrong descript… …ion in documentation.

Optimize core and fix SBIW instruction.
Move the PINDIV clk division from TIMER4 to PLL.
Make some modules reset synchronous.

+			if(up_count)

+			end
+			else
+			begin
+				{TCNTH, TCNTL} <= {TCNTH, TCNTL} - 16'd1;
+			end
+			// OCRA
+			if(updt_ocr_on_top ? ({TCNTH, TCNTL} == top_value) : (updt_ocr_on_bottom ? ({TCNTH, TCNTL} == 10'h000) : ({TCNTH, TCNTL} == OCRA_int)))
+			begin
+				OCRA_int <= {OCRAH, OCRAL};
+			end			
+			if({TCNTH, TCNTL} == OCRA_int)
+			begin
+				case({TCCRB[`WGM03:`WGM02], TCCRA[`WGM01:`WGM00]})
+					4'd4, 4'd12: oca <= ~oca;
+					default:
+					begin
+						case(OCRA_int)
+							16'h0000:	oca <= 1'b0;

+								end
+								else
+								begin
+									case(TCCRA[`COM0A1:`COM0A0])

+										2'h3: oca <= 1'b0;

+				end
+				else

+			if(USE_OCRB == "TRUE")

+				// OCRB
+				if(updt_ocr_on_top ? ({TCNTH, TCNTL} == top_value) : (updt_ocr_on_bottom ? ({TCNTH, TCNTL} == 10'h000) : ({TCNTH, TCNTL} == OCRB_int)))

+									end

+											2'h3: ocb <= 1'b0;

+									end
+								end
+							endcase
+						end
+					endcase

+						end
+					end
+					else
+					begin
+						ocrb_p <= 1'b0;

+					end
+				end

+						begin

+											2'h3: occ <= 1'b1;
+										endcase
+									end
+									else
+									begin
+										case(TCCRA[`COM0C1:`COM0C0])
+											2'h1: occ <= ~occ;
+											2'h2: occ <= 1'b1;
+											2'h3: occ <= 1'b0;
+										endcase
+									end
+								end
+							endcase
+						end
+					endcase
+					if(TIMSK[`OCIE0C] == 1'b1)
+					begin

+						begin
+							ocrc_p <= ~ocrc_p;
+						end
+					end

+					end
+				end
+			end // USE_OCRC != "TRUE"
+			if(USE_OCRD == "TRUE")
+			begin
+				// OCRB
+				if(updt_ocr_on_top ? ({TCNTH, TCNTL} == top_value) : (updt_ocr_on_bottom ? ({TCNTH, TCNTL} == 10'h000) : ({TCNTH, TCNTL} == OCRD_int)))
+				begin
+					OCRD_int <= {OCRDH, OCRDL};
+				end			
+				if({TCNTH, TCNTL} == OCRD_int)
+				begin
+					case({TCCRB[`WGM03:`WGM02], TCCRA[`WGM01:`WGM00]})
+						4'd4, 4'd12: ocd <= ~ocd;
+						default:
+						begin
+							case(OCRB_int)
+								16'h0000:	ocd <= 1'b0;

+				begin
+					if(GTCCR_ADDR < 'h40)

+				TCCRA_ADDR:

+					if(TCCRA_ADDR < 'h40)

 */

`timescale 1ns / 1ps

module rom  #(
    parameter ADDR_ROM_BUS_WIDTH = 14, /* < in address lines */
    parameter ROM_PATH = ""
) (
    input clk,
    input [ADDR_ROM_BUS_WIDTH-1:0] a,
    output reg[15:0]d
);

reg [15:0] mem [(2**ADDR_ROM_BUS_WIDTH)-1:0];

initial begin
if (ROM_PATH != "")
    $readmemh(ROM_PATH, mem);
end

always @ (posedge clk)
begin
        d <= mem[a];
end

endmodule


module ram  #(
    parameter ADDR_BUS_WIDTH = 13,  /* < in address lines */
    parameter DATA_BUS_WIDTH = 8,
    parameter RAM_PATH = ""
) (
    input clk,
    input we,
    input re,
    input [ADDR_BUS_WIDTH-1:0] a,
    input [DATA_BUS_WIDTH - 1:0] d_in,
    output [DATA_BUS_WIDTH - 1:0] d_out
);

reg [DATA_BUS_WIDTH - 1:0] mem [(2**ADDR_BUS_WIDTH)-1:0];

initial begin
if (RAM_PATH != "")
    $readmemh(RAM_PATH, mem);
end

always@(posedge clk) begin
    if(we)
        mem[a] <= d_in;
end

reg [DATA_BUS_WIDTH - 1:0]d_out_tmp;

always@(posedge clk) begin
    d_out_tmp <= mem[a];
end
assign d_out = re ? d_out_tmp : 8'b00;

endmodule

`timescale 1ns / 1ps
 
 module mega_ram  #(
	parameter ADDR_BUS_WIDTH = 13,  /* < in address lines */
	parameter DATA_BUS_WIDTH = 8,
	parameter RAM_PATH = ""
) (
	input clk,
	input we,
	input re,
	input [ADDR_BUS_WIDTH-1:0] a,
	input [DATA_BUS_WIDTH - 1:0] d_in,
	output [DATA_BUS_WIDTH - 1:0] d_out
);

(* ram_style="block" *)
reg [DATA_BUS_WIDTH - 1:0] mem [(2**ADDR_BUS_WIDTH)-1:0];
    
initial begin
if (RAM_PATH != "")
	$readmemh(RAM_PATH, mem);
end

always@(posedge clk) begin
	if(we)
		mem[a] <= d_in;
end

reg [DATA_BUS_WIDTH - 1:0]d_out_tmp;

always@(posedge clk) begin
	d_out_tmp <= mem[a];
end
assign d_out = re ? d_out_tmp : 8'b00;

endmodule
